changes.description: Added a real-hardware benchmark harness that generates the dataset-design matrix, launches flash_attn_func on cuda:0, measures median runtime, splits calibration/validation/query, calibrates the combined predictor on calibration data only, and reports validation/query metrics.
changes.motivation: The previous empirical pass used an emulator because torch and flash-attn were not installed. The environment is now ready, so real B200 kernel launches are required to validate the predictor.
changes.risk: fp4 precision is unsupported by the installed FA4 build; the harness falls back to bf16/fp16/fp8. Tiny configs are dominated by launch overhead not modeled by the predictor.

sections.summary: Single-file addition of a real-hardware benchmark harness; no changes to existing predictor, calibrate, or evaluate modules.

summary: Implementation change map for the real-hardware benchmark harness.
title: Implementation Change Map: Real-Hardware Benchmark Harness
